en.text: a prolonged (and causative) form of a primary verb δίω (to flee; compare the base of G1169 and G1249); to pursue (literally or figuratively); by implication, to persecute

senses.gloss_en: a prolonged (and causative) form of a primary verb δίω (to flee; compare the base of G1169 and G1249); to pursue (literally or figuratively); by implication, to persecute
